MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues
Off Calendar Feb-28-2022 Off Calendar

Motion To Seal Evidence Filed In Support Of Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues
Off Calendar Jan-20-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT 10UP, INC.'s Motion To Seal Evidence Filed In Support Of Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed motion to seal evidence filed in support of motion for summary judgment or, in the alternative, summary adjudication of issues, is granted. The motion complies with California Rules of Court, Rules 2.550 and 2.551. The Court finds that there exists an overriding interest that overcomes the right of public access to the portions of the records to be sealed; the overriding interest supports sealing those records; a substantial probability exists that the overriding interest will be prejudiced if the record is not sealed; the proposed sealing is narrowly tailored; and no less restrictive means exist to achieve the overriding interest.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
